name: Art Institute of Chicago
tagline: Search the Art Institute of Chicago collection
description: Search artwork records and select the fields needed for display, attribution, and IIIF image construction.

auth.hint: No authentication is required. Follow the response license and attribution information.

tools.name: search_artworks
tools.description: Search artwork records by free text with pagination and field selection.

params.name: limit
params.description: Results per page within the documented maximum.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated response fields such as id,title,artist_display,image_id.
